# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Metuki MB is your neighborhood coffee destination — browse our digital menu, place orders online, and experience craft coffee culture made for real coffee lovers.

### Our Story
https://example.com/our-story
From humble beginnings to a beloved local brand, discover the heart and hustle behind Metuki MB — a new coffee shop redefining what community coffee culture truly means.

### Craft & Signature Offerings
https://example.com/craft
Explore Metuki MB&#39;s signature drinks and handcrafted offerings — from bold espresso blends to seasonal specials. Order online and taste why we stand out among coffee shops near me.

### Visit & Contact
https://example.com/contact
Looking for small coffee shops near me? Visit Metuki MB, get directions, check our hours, and connect with us — your next favorite coffee stop is closer than you think.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Metuki MB
